/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -ffast-math -march=native -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/latency_spike.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/latency_spike.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o latency_spike  /usr/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.13.0
